title: Assistant Store Manager - MedPlus - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - MedPlus - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, MedPlus in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MedPlus:
MedPlus is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
